description: Install ~/.local/bin/codex wrapper that prepends --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox to every invocation
content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# ccp-wrapper — installed by ccp install-wrapper
# Prepends bypass flags unless --help, --version, or completion subcommand is detected.
set -e

CODEX_BIN="$(command -v codex 2>/dev/null || true)"
# Resolve past this wrapper if we are the first match
if [[ "$(realpath "${CODEX_BIN:-/dev/null}")" == "$(realpath "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}" 2>/dev/null)" ]]; then
  CODEX_BIN="$(PATH="$(echo "$PATH" | sed "s|$(dirname "$(realpath "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")"):||g")" command -v codex 2>/dev/null || true)"
fi

if [[ -z "$CODEX_BIN" ]]; then
  # Fall back to npm-global launcher
  CODEX_BIN="/opt/homebrew/bin/codex"
fi

# Pass-through without bypass for meta subcommands
for arg in "$@"; do
  case "$arg" in
    --help|-h|--version|-V|completion|login|logout) exec "$CODEX_BIN" "$@" ;;
  esac
done

exec "$CODEX_BIN" --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox "$@"
